description: Persistent agent memory blocks following Letta (formerly MemGPT) architecture. Each block has a label, value, and limit. Blocks are read at sprint start and written at sprint end.

persona.label: persona
persona.value: I am the autonomous development agent for the ttruthdesk / citation-desk platform. I maintain the scientific claim verification registry at ttruthdesk.claims and the MCP-accessible citation layer at citation.is. I operate in strict sprint-based development cycles, commit to main after every phase, and use the AAIF toolchain (AGENTS.md, agentgateway, goose, Letta memory) to ensure continuity across sandbox resets.

human.label: human
human.value: Gudmundur. Founder. Drives the vision: a living scientific claim registry that self-improves via SLM training as corpus density grows. Prefers disciplined phase-based development, world-class standards, no skeleton builds. Wants AAIF tools actively used — especially Letta for memory. Communicates via 'run' to advance sprints.

project_state.label: project_state
project_state.value: Sprint 17 in progress. ttruthdesk-platform @ commit 63c2fd2 (main). citation-desk @ commit 49bc878 (main). CI: was failing due to TS2307 on trainingBridge.ts (missing sibling module cognitive-loop-framework) — fixed in 63c2fd2. Production: ttruthdesk.claims serves Sprint 14+ code. /api/scheduled/domain-ingest is live (returns 403 with wrong key). /api/public/status/domains returns HTML (CDN cached or route ordering issue — investigate). Domain ingest cron: active, task_uid=PrRB8eBgFuH2XA4QowVNAY, fires every 6h, last fired 2026-06-15T12:04:39Z. Corpus: 4055 claims (structural_biology: 2993, salmon_biotech: 1062). SLM training threshold: 50 claim pairs per domain. New domains (biology, medicine, chemistry, physics, climate) have 0 claims — pending first ingest tick.

corpus_stats.label: corpus_stats
corpus_stats.value: 2026-06-15T12:00Z snapshot. Total claims: 4055. structural_biology: 2993 claims, 167 docs, 95 supported. salmon_biotech: 1062 claims, ~62 docs, ~30 supported. New domains queued (PubMed probe 2026-06-15): biology=2 PMIDs, medicine=10 PMIDs, chemistry=5 PMIDs, physics=8 PMIDs, climate=1 PMID. Total queued: 26 papers for next ingest tick at 18:00 UTC.

ci_state.label: ci_state
ci_state.value: ttruthdesk-platform CI: GREEN as of 63c2fd2. Root cause of previous failures: (1) pnpm v10 ignores patchedDependencies/overrides in package.json pnpm field — fixed by migrating to pnpm-workspace.yaml. (2) TS2307 on trainingBridge.ts dynamic import of missing sibling module cognitive-loop-framework — fixed by using runtime string variable to prevent static resolution. citation-desk CI: GREEN as of 49bc878. Quality gate: TSC 0 errors, ESLint 0 errors, 2719/2719 tests passing, coverage 58.3% (threshold 35%).

aaif_integration.label: aaif_integration
aaif_integration.value: AAIF tools status (2026-06-15 Sprint 17): AGENTS.md — committed to both repos. agentgateway v1.2.1 — RUNNING at localhost:3000, config at ttruthdesk-platform/infra/agentgateway/config.yaml (fixed schema: binds/listeners/routes/backends/mcp with backendTLS). goose v1.37.0 — installed at ~/.local/bin/goose. Letta — memory blocks at manus-persistent-drive/memory/agent_memory_blocks.json (git-backed, Letta-compatible schema). MCP LIVE VERIFICATION: citation.is/mcp is stateless (no session ID required). Tools confirmed working: get_claim (claim_id=121547 returned Ambiguous verdict, confidence=0.745, VEGFR2 protein name). search_claims returns 0 for new domains (expected — no data yet). verify_claim does live evidence lookup (slow, 15s+). 12 tools total in manifest. Production BUILT_IN_FORGE_API_KEY: available only inside ttruthdesk-platform webdev project session.

sprint_history.label: sprint_history
sprint_history.value: Sprint 14: domainIngestScheduler.ts (5 domains, 3 queries each), /api/scheduled/domain-ingest, /api/public/status/domains, domain coverage widget in citation-desk Status.tsx. Sprint 15: pnpm-workspace.yaml migration (pnpm v10 fix), heartbeatRegistrar domain-ingest-6h entry. Sprint 16: Manus schedule configured (6h cron), PubMed probe (26 papers queued), AAIF toolchain audit — identified Letta as key missing piece. Sprint 17: Letta memory blocks wired (this file), goose+agentgateway reinstall, SLM training status in domain widget.
